response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems experience central to the role; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience (limited to early career), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks documented leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering mentorship
